zh.Hazlewood, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾哈茲列武德
zh.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Vavasour II於從1334年5月25日到1355年8月1日出生在英國越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特時，他的父親Sir Henry Vavasour II63歲，母親Anabella FitzHugh47歲。他於1361年10月16日與Elizabeth Stapleton結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1381年4月1日之前在英國越可爾。

zh-hans.Hazlewood, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾哈茲列武德
zh-hans.Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Engla: 英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Vavasour II于从1334年5月25日到1355年8月1日出生在英国越可爾哈茲列武德 白 塔德卡斯特时，他的父亲Sir Henry Vavasour II63岁，母亲Anabella FitzHugh47岁。他于1361年10月16日与Elizabeth Stapleton结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1381年4月1日之前在英国越可爾。

nameMeanings.name: Vavasour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: status name for a feudal tenant ranking immediately below a baron, Old French vavas(s)our, vavasseur, Latin vassus vassorum ‘vassal of vassals’.

variants.name: Bavister
meanings: English: Titford suggests that this is a late variant of Vavasour . It would be a dissimilated form of Vavister and Vavester, variants of Vavasour that are evidenced in Lincs, also in Cambs, whence the name spread into Beds. Compare Willa Vavister, 1579 in IGI (Scopwick, Lincs); Thomas Vavister, 1615 in IGI (Cranwell, Lincs); Mary Vavester, 1708, Joseph Vavisor, 1738 in IGI (New Sleaford, Lincs).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William Vavasour II was born from 25 May 1334 to 1 August 1355, in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England, his father, Sir Henry Vavasour II, was 63 and his mother, Anabella FitzHugh, was 47. He married Elizabeth Stapleton on 16 October 1361. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died before 1 April 1381, in Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Vavasour II est né du 25 mai 1334 au 1 août 1355, à Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry Vavasour II, avait 63 ans et sa mère, Anabella FitzHugh, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Stapleton le 16 octobre 1361. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé avant 1 avril 1381, à Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Vavasour II von 25. Mai 1334 bis 1. August 1355 in Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry Vavasour II 63 und seine Mutter Anabella FitzHugh 47. Er hat am 16. Oktober 1361 Elizabeth Stapleton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb vor 1. April 1381 in Yorkshire, England.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Stapleton il 16 ottobre 1361. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì prima del 1 aprile 1381, nel Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: William Vavasour IIがから1334年5月25日まで1355年8月1日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハズルオオッド ビー タドカスターで生まれた時，父Sir Henry Vavasour IIは63歳，母Anabella FitzHughは47歳であった。1361年10月16日にElizabeth Stapletonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1381年4月1日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Vavasour II(이)가 1334년 5월 25일부터 1355년 8월 1일까지 영국 요르크실르 하즐루드 비 타드카스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry Vavasour II(은)는 63세였고, 그의 어머니 Anabella FitzHugh(은)는 47세였다. 그는 1361년 10월 16일 Elizabeth Stapleton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1381년 4월 1일 이전 영국 요르크실르에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Vavasour II nasceu de 25 de maio de 1334 a 1 de agosto de 1355, em Hazlewood by Tadcaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry Vavasour II, tinha 63 anos e sua mãe, Anabella FitzHugh, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Stapleton em 16 de outubro de 1361. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 1 de abril de 1381, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Vavasour II родился с 25 мая 1334 по 1 августа 1355 в местности хазльвуд би тадкастир, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry Vavasour II было 63 года, а матери, которую звали Anabella FitzHugh, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Stapleton 16 октября 1361 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер перед 1 апрель 1381 г. в местности еркшир, Англия.
